name: Black Hawk
creator: oof_ed (551992971)
notes: Pulls 1m value when traded for obtainables but less when traded for limiteds
description: The Black Hawk is an aerial vehicle in Jailbreak. Added in the 1 Year Anniversary Update, this vehicle spawns on the second floor of the 1M Dealership and one of the helicopter pads in the Military Base.  The Black Hawk is based on the Sikorsky UH-60 Black Hawk. Its appearance comes equipped with three cosmetic landing gears: two in the front, and one in the back. It has the third-highest seating capacity out of any vehicle, with 8 seats (9 if including the rope), only behind the Goliath, which has 10 seats and 1 minigun seat, and the Prison Bus, which has 15 seats. On October 4, 2022, the Black Hawk was teased to be revamped with a new accurate exterior design and detailed interior, and this would be a free upgrade to all owners. The revamp came three days later on October 7, 2022, in the update of Season 12: Bring in the Military. The most significant change was thought by many to be the vehicle's size as it can now reliably fit inside the Volcano Criminal Base's entrances, unlike its old counterpart.  The Black Hawk has special missiles that cost 5,000 in-game cash for a pack of ten. The maximum damage a missile can deal with is ~25 HP. Any shots that hit the surrounding areas of the target will make the target take less damage than a direct hit. The Black Hawk can wipe out a player if the aim is very accurate, otherwise, it will take three missiles to fully wipe out a player. This makes it weaker compared to that of the Jet, whose surrounding damage can wipe out a player with two hits. The Black Hawk is the fourth-fastest aircraft in-game, featuring one of the fastest reverse speeds. The vehicle also has a high maximum altitude. Other notable factors are its ability to fly over all obstacles, unlike land vehicles, and its missiles being fast and formerly easier to use than those of the Jet.

name: UFO
creator: Badimo
notes: Pulls 500k value when traded for obtainables but less when traded for limiteds
description: The UFO is one of the ten aerial vehicles found in Jailbreak and was added in the Aliens Update. The UFO was remodeled in the 5 Days of Vehicles update of July 2020, where it received an interior and was given a complete facelift, as well as its disk spinning animation. The vehicle also received a buff in max altitude and speed in the same update. The UFO is located in the remote Top Secret Research barrack in the Military Base. There is a hatch that allows the player to exit on top of the barrack, which opens when a player gets nearby. In the 5 Days of Vehicles Update, the UFO was given a refreshed look. It now resembles a circular disk that constantly rotates if a player is in the driver's seat, and a beam projects from below at the centre, which represents a tractor beam, though it serves no purpose other than decoration. On the top, the UFO has a protruding hemispherical canopy that can be seen through. A rope can be lowered from the UFO to hold an extra player, tow vehicles, and grab crates from the Cargo Ship. Before the revamp, the UFO looked similar to its current model but was more bulbous, had less depth in the model, lacked an interior, and did not have the spinning effect. The UFO has been rather infamous for a generally negative reception. The vehicle is quite costly and challenging to obtain due to its high price and the requirement of entering the Military Base. After the overhaul, the UFO now features great performance, which is ahead most of the vehicles and behind a fair amount as well. Despite so, the vehicle still has a below-average price to performance ratio. It is slower than the Little Bird, which is 310,000 less than the UFO, and is also tied with the Helicopter, which is free. Although its performance was buffed, its reception remains negative. Overall, the UFO is decent but rather overpriced to some players. Being an aerial vehicle, it can easily fly over any obstacle, and can make up for its somewhat bad price to performance ratio. One of the pros of the UFO is it being a small flying vehicle with a rope. It's great at robbing the Cargo Ship, due to its maneuverability which allows it to easily dodges missiles.

name: Stunt
creator: Zewo_Tsu (102700598)
notes: Pulls 300k value when traded for obtainables but less when traded for limiteds
description: The Stunt is an aerial vehicle that was added in the Planes Update, alongside the Jet. It is notable for having two wing-embedded machine guns and a smoke trail. The Stunt was added on June 30, 2019, and received a remodel on November 2, 2023. The Stunt is based on the P-51 Mustang, specifically the B and C variants equipped with the "Malcolm Hood". Manufactured by American aerospace manufacturer North American Aviation, the P-51 Mustang and its variants have a historical reputation, being used in various conflicts around the world during its time. It features a functional canopy with a spinning grey propeller at the front and is equipped with dual wing-embedded machine guns; however, it is not recommended to fire too much, as just like the minigun, as it will overheat. The Stunt, while going through a price increase, is still seen superior to its original version in terms of performance. Its top speed surpasses all aerial vehicles but the Jet, acceleration is now greater than it already was, and its handling remains complex yet amazing as it was before. It features phenomenal performance for its price, being the second-best aerial vehicle, even better than the pre-revamp Jet, making it highly recommended for new players.

name: Little Bird
creator: Badimo
description:
The Little Bird is an aerial vehicle in Jailbreak. Added in the Cargo Ship Update, this compact helicopter features four seats, a rope, and a detailed interior, the first of its kind. It is on the helipad on top of the Prison and Rising City Bank. Before the 2023 Prison Update, the Little Bird also spawned on the helipad at the Police HQ. The Little Bird is possibly the most useful helicopter to rob the Cargo Ship with, as it is relatively quick, easy to access, and is a much smaller target than other helicopters, but can be shot down more easily, only being able to take three shots. Compared to the Helicopter, the Little Bird is faster, has a smaller turning radius, and can fit into smaller spaces. The Little Bird also has some disadvantages, such as spawning in two somewhat hard to reach locations (for Criminals). Furthermore, with a price of Cash Icon190,000, the vehicle is relatively expensive for new players.
The Little Bird has rather good performance, including good top speed, launch, acceleration, reverse speed, and maneuverability. The Little Bird is overall better than the Helicopter, but far behind when compared to the Black Hawk, the now-removed Blade, and the Drone. Despite being slower than most other vehicles, the vehicle can reach destinations faster as it can fly, giving it an advantage over several faster and more expensive land vehicles. Overall, the Little Bird is a great vehicle to buy, being very useful for robbing the Cargo Ship, and being a good daily-driver. Despite having similar performance to the Helicopter, its performance and spawn points make up for the price.

name: Heli
creator: Badimo
description: The Helicopter is one of the nine aerial vehicle in Jailbreak, the others including, but not limited to, the UFO, Black Hawk, Jet, Little Bird and the Drone. The Helicopter is also the first free aerial vehicle to be added to the game. The vehicle spawns at the Rising City Police Station, Military Base and the Prison Police Station. Prior to the June 2023 Update, the Helicopter spawn at Rising City Police Station was at the Police HQ. The Helicopter, like most of the other aerial vehicles, can be disabled if shot enough times by a weapon, rendering it unable to fly for a few seconds. Black smoke emits from the Helicopter during when it is shot down. Jumping out or being kicked out of the Helicopter will allow players to deploy a parachute if high enough, which can be removed by pressing Spacebar. However, if a player releases the parachute from a high enough height, they will ragdoll and take fall damage. If a Prisoner or Criminal is piloting the Helicopter or flew it last, the rotors appear red. If a Police officer is piloting the Helicopter or flew it last, the rotors appear blue. When the Helicopter spawns, the rotors appear gray. The Helicopter can drop explosives by pressing the B key for laptop/desktop devices or tapping the button for mobile. Bombs fall downwards and deal 70 damage if the target was hit directly. The bombs can travel further if the Helicopter is moving while they are dropped. Explosives can be bought for 5,000 when the counter reaches zero. Unlike missiles, they cannot be aimed. In the Blade Update, the Helicopter now features spotlights. They can be activated by pressing the L key on the keyboard. The spotlights are controlled manually and can slow down criminals caught in the light. The Helicopter received a revamp in the update of Season 5: Let the Memes Begin of August 7, 2021, being given an interior. The Helicopter is slower than the Camaro, but as the former can fly over terrain, it is much faster for cross-map travel. Most aspects are above average compared to many other vehicles, including speed, acceleration, and maneuvering. The Helicopter can intercept cars such as La Matador and Brulee in a chase, and can even intercept an Eclaire. Overall, the Helicopter is a great vehicle for both inexperienced and experienced Police and Criminals when playing Jailbreak, with its combination of good stats, practicality, and being free to use.

name: Jet
creator: Badimo
notes: Pulls 1m value when traded for obtainables but less when traded for limiteds
description: The Jet is a fighter plane in Jailbreak that was added in the Planes Update of June 30, 2019. It spawns inside a hanger at Bounty Bay Airport, while on the runway at the Military Base. The Jet is known for its excellent speed and powerful heat seeking missiles. The Jet appears to be based off the Lockheed Martin F-22A Raptor, featuring 3 landing gears arranged in a tricycle setup and light grey ailerons. The afterburning engines leave a short trail behind the plane and the wings will leave a short contrail. The Jet is mainly used by players for grinding and entertainment purposes. Due to its incredible stats, the vehicle is suitable to be used for grinding or as a method of escape from enemies. However, due to its rather complex controls, some players may have trouble while attempting to use the Jet. The Jet was revamped in the October 2022 Update with Heat Seeking missiles, in-flight reloading, an additional seat, radio & mobile firing support, rudder controls, and more speed. On November 2, 2023, Day 1 of the 2023 5 Days of Vehicles Event, the Jet received proper first camera support along with the Crater City Airport spawn being replaced with the Stunt. With its high-performance stats and amazing abilities, the Jet is known as one of the most extreme vehicles in Jailbreak. Its controls may be complex for inexperienced players, but more experienced players can find an easy time using it due to its extremely high maneuverability, even more than the Stunt. It can travel across the map faster than any of the other vehicles, despite not having the fastest top speed in the game. The Jet can also travel on land, but its speed is considerably slower, reversing is considerably slow, and players will not be able to steer when cruising near take-off speed. It is by far much faster than the Drone and has the highest max altitude in the game, making it a very good vehicle, though it has a much slower launch and brakes and is bigger. Overall, the Jet is an excellent grinding vehicle to use for players who have mastered its controls.

name: Escape Bot
creator: JBDelorean (280742494)
description: The Escape Bot is a community-created aerial vehicle in Jailbreak. This vehicle is not garage-spawnable. The Escape Bot is a vehicle that can be obtained from the Mansion Robbery Bonus Roll. Players have a 15% chance of rolling it. It can be found underneath the Military Base, along with the other Level 4 bases, such as the Criminal Lair and Secret Agent Base. The Escape Bot appears to be similar to the Egg Mobile that Doctor Eggman rides on in the Sonic the Hedgehog series. In many regards, the Escape Bot is basically a helicopter with a worse carrying capacity and less health. However, its smaller hitbox and easy maneuverability makes it harder to hit than other aerial vehicles and better in some situations. It also has the added benefit that criminals don't need to hijack the vehicle in order to use it, as it is not considered a police vehicle by default. Due to its spawn location in the Secret Agent Base and small size, it is a very convenient vehicle for robbery/robbery prevention of the Cargo Ship. However, it can only take two direct shots from the turrets, so players would want to be swift with their maneuvers. Its speed and acceleration also allow it to more easily connect its rope to the crates than some faster moving vehicles.

name: Drone
creator: Badimo
description: The Drone is a retired aerial vehicle in Jailbreak. Added on November 8, 2020, it served as the replacement of the now-removed Blade. It previously spawned in the parking space of the 1M Dealership that once held the spawn of the Blade, after the vehicle was removed. It also spawned in the parking lot of the Mini Police Station. The Drone was retired and replaced by the Bionic vehicle in the Bionic Update and became the first limited aerial vehicle. The Drone is a compact aerial vehicle. It has two horizontally spinning propellers on both sides and one vertically placed propeller at the back. Its side scissor doors look similar to that of the Blade and open in the same way. There are various light strips placed around the Drone, such as under the windshield, under the doors, and one continuous strip going around the back glass. Similar to the Blade, the Drone also has a helicopter spotlight at the front. It has a higher altitude limit than the Blade and Crew Capsule, but its altitude is lower than the other aerial vehicles, such as the Black Hawk. The Drone's small size makes it great for entering and exiting the Volcano Criminal Base, which is great for people who are robbing the Power Plant. The Drone performs similarly to the late Blade, with instantaneous acceleration, powerful launch speed, good maneuverability, and respectable braking power. The Drone's top speed is slightly faster than that of the Black Hawk, but slower than those of the Blade and Jet. The speed at which the vehicle's height increases and decreases is rather slow, leading to the Drone often ramming into obstacles as it may not go over them fast enough. Overall, the Drone is a great aerial vehicle, and goes faster than many other vehicles due to its hovering ability. The vehicle is well worth the price tag, being incredibly quick and relatively small, making it great for getaways. Despite this, the Jet can be a better option for its higher performance if one is used to its controls, or the Black Hawk for its slightly lower speed but higher capacity, rope, and flying instead of hovering.

name: Jet Ski
creator: Badimo
description: The Jet Ski is a water vehicle added in the Jet Ski & Power Plant Update. The Jet Ski spawns at three locations: behind the Crater City Bank, at the dock across from the Oil Rig and on the Oil Rig to escape the robbery. It was the first watercraft vehicle to be added to the game, and is also the third-fastest vehicle in the game. The Jet Ski is a noteworthy vehicle for setting the record as the fastest vehicle in Jailbreak at a ludicrous 488 MPH. Released during the Jet Ski and Robbery Update of June 9th, 2019, it was a popular request from the community. Many were dubious about the idea, as the Jailbreak map at the time was smaller with less bodies of water. It became a more accepted idea after the Map Expansion Update, which made its use more beneficial. The Jet Ski is one of four aquatic vehicles, the other three being the Sloop, Speed Yacht and the Cruiser. Though rarely used, the Jet Ski is well known for its phenomenal speed and acceleration. The Jet Ski is only held back by its medium of travel - it cannot be used on land, limiting its effectiveness. The Jet Ski is quite a powerful vehicle, being a cheap and quick watercraft that can travel across the map within seconds due to its absurd speed and acceleration. Despite having some over-steer and average braking ability, it is still quite easy to drive around with some practice. The only disappointing factors are its reverse speed and durability, both of which are the worst in the game. It is also limited to water without the use of glitches.

name: Tanker
creator: SwarmerXXXL (1234289052)
description: The Tanker is a community-created vehicle added to Jailbreak as part of the Season 24: Winter Rally update. This vehicle come with an interesting feature that causes it to explode. This behemoth of a vehicle is quite powerful but not in the ways one expects. It is a ticking time bomb to unsuspecting players utter demise. Once this vehicle's health reaches zero, it explodes dealing damage and ragdolling all players around it that are within its blast radius, which is quite large. While also propelling them away based on how close they are to the explosion. This detonation even affects those inside vehicles. A delayed explosion can also be triggered with a hotkey set with this vehicle with the same results. Overall, it is a great vehicle for trolling and clearing out hordes of enemies, albeit not so great for use in every day gameplay due to it's behavior, it being a big target, and it's gimmick of exploding when being shot at enough times. The performance is about what you would expect from a vehicle of this size, with poor braking and launch. However, it makes up for that with a large amount of durability and surprisingly fast top speed. When compared to other trucks like the Semi and the Cybertruck, the Tanker is the faster option while having a smaller price tag. Overall this is not a recommended starter vehicle, but is still has a good bang for it's buck.

name: Iceborn
creator: omega_vv (2428138161)
description: The Iceborn features a custom engine start and avalanche effects above 110MPH. The Iceborn went on sale after the ice melted when the total cash goal of 20,000,000,000 was reached, and was on-sale for 5 days. The vehicle was found at the Ice Stage in the lake near the Rising City. The Iceborn is a two-seater Hypercar based on the SSC Tuatara, with subtle changes to the back exhaust and front of the vehicle. With a smooth, sleek design, this vehicle has both good stats and looks. The Iceborn features excellent performance for its price, rivaling other hypercars in its class. It has a great mix of top speed, launch, acceleration, and handling, making it an ideal car for driving all around the map, while doing it in style with its avalanche effects after reaching 110 MPH. Overall, this vehicle is phenomenal and is an excellent vehicle to buy. It does come with a risk, however, as the avalanche effect can be utilized by the opposing team to better track your vehicle's location.

name: Stormrider
creator: Ickleon37 (847255377)
description: The Stormrider is a seasonal vehicle featured as the grand prize for Season 24: Winter Rally. This rally car has built in spotlights, an off-road suspension, and popup headlights. The Stormrider is a 2-seater car and features pop-up headlights, with an additional 8 in the front and top of the vehicle. The top lights contain a beam of light that extends along the hood of the vehicle, being the first ever vehicle to have so. The vehicle contains vents on the front, a ducktail spoiler on the back and an antenna at the top, giving the car a clean and detailed look.

name: HyperBlue Level 1
creator: CritStyx (2829005475)
description: HyperChromes are special customization colors in Jailbreak. They can only be obtained via the Robbery Bonus Rewards system. Unlike normal customization colors in terms of appearance, HyperChromes are shiny and reflective. They appear in a variety of different colors (Red, Blue, Green, Orange, Yellow, Purple, Pink and Diamond), similar to normal customization color options. After completing a robbery, players get a roll with a small chance of obtaining a HyperChrome. They start with a Level 1 HyperChrome after their first successful roll, which will level up to a maximum of Level 5 as they receive more HyperChromes. Like other customization options, HyperChromes can be traded at the Trading Island at any level.

Unlike normal customization colors in terms of appearance, HyperChromes are shiny and reflective. They appear in a variety of different colors (Red, Blue, Green, Orange, Yellow, Purple, Pink and Diamond), similar to normal customization color options. After completing a robbery, players get a roll with a small chance of obtaining a HyperChrome. They start with a Level 1 HyperChrome after their first successful roll, which will level up to a maximum of Level 5 as they receive more HyperChromes. Like other customization options, HyperChromes can be traded at the Trading Island at any level.

description: The HyperShift is a special customization color in Jailbreak that can only be obtained via owning every Level 5 HyperChrome. The HyperShift appears similarly to the HyperChromes; the only difference is that the HyperShift automatically shifts through all of the colors. The HyperShift is non-tradable. If players lose any of their Level 5 HyperChromes, they also lose their HyperShift. The only way to "trade" the HyperShift is to trade all 8 of the Level 5 HyperChromes.

name: Cobra
creator: NstMatt (201573841)
description: The Cobra is a seasonal vehicle featured as the grand prize for Season 26: Jungle Adventure. This vehicle has been designed to conquer the jungle with character and style. According to a post made by a tester of Jailbreak and a Power Plant run conducted by the creator, the Cobra has very similar stats to the Trailblazer, featuring a similar top speed and similar acceleration to the Trailblazer. While not being the first vehicle to feature turrets in the game, the Cobra is the first land vehicle in the game to feature turrets which can be used by the driver while driving it as the only other land vehicles which have turrets require a separate person to operate them. The Cobra is equipped with two machine guns, similar to those found on the Stunt plane. They deal 10 damage to vehicles and 2 damage to players. Their combined rate of fire is comparable to that of the minigun mounted on the SWAT Van, Celestial, Striker and Bank Truck. Like the miniguns on those vehicles, the Cobra’s machine guns feature an overheat mechanic, allowing about 5 seconds of continuous fire before requiring a cooldown. Additionally, their bullets are affected by projectile drop, though less significantly than those of other miniguns.

name: Expeditioner
creator: Plasmazillah (1009227115)
description: The Expeditioner is a safe-exclusive vehicle in Jailbreak.  It is only available in Common Safes. The Expeditioner is a vehicle specifically designed for off-roading and expedition. It is without a doubt, a car made for exploring the Jailbreak map. With a table inside featuring a microscope and an opening dome on top, this is certainly a unique vehicle in terms of looks. It also features a non-removable decal on both sides with scuffs below showing the vehicle has been through previous adventures. There are bars in front of the grill and a ladder in the back. The blower intergraded into the hood shows this vehicle has some serious power.The performance of this vehicle decent overall. It's off-roading however, is the main point of this vehicle. It excels in rugged terrain and climbs most hills without trouble. This vehicle also has very amazing handling and is able to make most tight corners with with ease. As this is a vehicle featured in the Common safes, the overall stats are somewhat low in most cases and should not be recommended for newer players as a starter vehicle and should instead save their money for cheaper vehicles with better stats. But if you manage to get it in you're first few safes, it will certainly be worth the cash.

name: Blackbeard
creator: Plasmazillasc (1009227115)
description: The Blackbeard is a seasonal vehicle featured as the grand prize for Season 27: A Pirate's Treasure. This hot-rod features engine shake, particles and, a steering rudder. The Blackbeard could have been obtained by reaching Level 10 through Contracts. It could have been found at the Season Hypezone during Season 27. The Blackbeard is quite a unique vehicle with it's overall design and features. Built like a hot rod with it's body designed to look similar to a capsized pirate ship. Further going with the pirate theme, it also includes a large rudder on the rear that moves when the vehicle is turning, hatches that close when a player gets in, and a compartment behind the driver and passenger seats where treasure can be seen. It also comes with two large exhaust pipes on the sides and six small ones on top of it's two large engines. Not to forget this vehicle's ability to drive on water which is a feature shared with another vehicle. With all of these things considered, it makes it a cool and interesting vehicle to use in Jailbreak. The Blackbeard performs well for a hot rod. With a high top speed and reverse speed. it is also somewhat neutral in braking with a 2 second wait for it to come to a complete stop, which is reasonable as of it’s high speeds of up to 272MPH. It has a high launch speed of 70MPH and excellent off-roading capabilities making it a good choice for getaways. Combined with its unique ability to drive on bodies of water without suffering from speed loss, like the Delorean, it is a solid vehicle to use when playing criminal. It can also be used by police strategically to quickly arrive at areas like the Crater City Bank due to the location being next to the ocean. Although it’s handling isn’t particularly good with a low value compared to other vehicles such as the MCL36 and Bloxy, it’s ability to drive on water, as mentioned previously makes up for it. The Blackbeard also has 100HP making it stronger than most vehicles that can go a similar speed, with most having 75 or less.

name: Orion M42
creator: Stealth_Llama (424239986)
description: The Orion M42 is the newest limited-time vehicle in Jailbreak. This vehicle features all new custom engine sound and startup, first-of-its-kind ground effect on its startup along with high speeds and excellent handling. The Orion M42 was on-sale for 6 days. The vehicle was found behind the Train Station at the Pirate Hypezone. The Orion M42 boasts some of the best stats found in the game. The Orion M42 has a top speed of 300 MPH and has phenomenal acceleration. The Orion M42 also has a special start-up effect being a special star displayed on the ground which is visible when first entering the vehicle. The Orion M42 has excellent stats overall for a limited-time vehicle. It's very similar to the Beignet in terms of top speed and handling. It's an excellent hypercar and has surprisingly good off-roading and acceleration. The Orion M42 has phenomenal turnspeed and traction, even better than most hypercars in the game. It is viewed as Beignet’s rival because both feature very similar speed and handling. However the differences are Orion has slightly better acceleration, while Beignet has better ground clearance. Overall, the Onion M42 was a great vehicle to buy when it was available.

name: Polaire
creator: phindr (76393113)
description: The Polaire is a limited-time vehicle in Jailbreak. The Polaire features a driver-controlled track wing with aero effects, a custom engine sound with startup and exhaust pops, an animated lightbar with multiple expressions, two exclusive vehicle skins and a new jump ability. The Polaire is on-sale for 7 days. The Polaire Turbo is Jailbreak's first gymkhana-inspired stunt car, with a striking design that draws design cues from various concept racecars. On the exterior, this cross between motorsport and technology means additions such as competition-ready foglights, mudflaps, aero components and cooling ducts. A new steering-reactive rear wing and a new animated Pixel lightbar also add to the car's flair and performance. Inside the Polaire Turbo, two grippy alcantara-lined bucket seats hold the driver and passenger in place, facing a reactive digital dashboard. An extensive interior rollcage provides structural support to the chassis, cabin, and engine bay, which houses a turbocharged four-cylinder rally engine. The Polaire Turbo also includes many customization options for owners. Two custom racing liveries are provided as a bonus for owners to equip, along with an extensive set of recolorable options- including accent color, mudflaps, rollcage, engine bay and interior materials.

name: Renesis
creator: Plasmazillasc (1009227115)
description: The Renesis is a community-created vehicle added to Jailbreak as part of the 2026 5 Days of Vehicles Event in the 2026 Live Event Update. It debuts Bodykits, a new vehicle customization category, with 6 unique bodykits to choose from. The Renesis has some pretty competitive stats in its price range. The main draw to this car has to be its exceptional handling and turning at high speeds, allowing it to be maneuvered quickly around sharper corners, without losing much of its speed. It, like the Shogun and Deja, also has an overdrive function that activates at 160 MPH, allowing it to instantly accelerate to speeds around 190 MPH.
